title: Coerce Integer to Object
cap_description: Wrap an integer value in a record
documentation:
## Purpose

Wraps an integer value in a record so it can be passed to caps that expect a structured record input.

## Inputs

An integer value (media type `media:integer;numeric;textable`).

## Outputs

A record containing the integer value.

## Notes

- Type adapter for the capfab planner.
- Use when connecting an integer-producing cap to a record-consuming cap.
